question_text: A skateboarder rides down a hill and then up a ramp. At the bottom of the hill, all of their energy is kinetic energy. As they go up the ramp, what happens to their kinetic and gravitational potential energy?

options.label: A
options.text: Kinetic energy decreases and gravitational potential energy increases

options.label: B
options.text: Kinetic energy increases and gravitational potential energy decreases

options.label: C
options.text: Both kinetic and gravitational potential energy increase

options.label: D
options.text: Both kinetic and gravitational potential energy decrease

explanation: As the skateboarder moves up the ramp, they slow down because kinetic energy is converted to gravitational potential energy. The total energy stays the same, but the type of energy changes.
